rationale: Contract lens; APPROVE-on-APPROVE. The populate.go change is sound. (1) DomainsNeedingPopulate now reads workspace.DomainsDir(root) = resolveArtifact(root,"domains") with flat-first precedence (flat .mindspec/domains → canonical .mindspec/docs/domains → legacy docs/domains); the workspace.go docstring confirms it is byte-for-byte filepath.Join(DocsDir,"domains") for every canonical/legacy/greenfield tree, so the swap is purely additive — zero behavior change for canonical projects, and the os.ReadDir + LoadOwnership + IsNotExist→nil control flow is untouched. (2) No import cycle: grep of internal/workspace finds NO ownership import, so the path/filepath→internal/workspace swap is acyclic; build ./... and vet pass clean. (3) Coverage: TestDomainsNeedingPopulate_FlatTree (flat tier, want [absent,stub]) + existing _MissingAndEmptyStubOnly (canonical .mindspec/docs/domains tier) + _NoDomainsDir pin all three states across both layouts — all PASS (count=1). ownership/doctor/validate suites green. The commit touches only populate.go, populate_test.go, and the 2 plugin docs; round-1 install-refresh + tier-awareness mechanisms are undisturbed. No contract issue.

findings.issue: path/filepath→internal/workspace import swap; DomainsNeedingPopulate now enumerates workspace.DomainsDir(root) (flat-first, byte-identical to the old filepath.Join(root,.mindspec,docs,domains) on canonical/legacy). Verified additive, no behavior change for canonical projects.
internal/workspace does NOT import internal/ownership (grep clean), so ownership→workspace introduces no cycle. go build ./... and go vet ./internal/ownership/... both exit 0.

New TestDomainsNeedingPopulate_FlatTree covers the flat .mindspec/domains tier (missing+empty-stub+populated → want [absent,stub]); the pre-existing _MissingAndEmptyStubOnly covers the canonical .mindspec/docs/domains tier; _NoDomainsDir covers absence. Both layouts pinned; all three PASS under -count=1.

findings.area: cmd/mindspec/migrate.go scanCanonicalDocs vs flat rubric (carryover from round-1)
findings.issue: Round-1 non-blocking finding unchanged by this commit: migrate inventory still keys 'canonical' solely to .mindspec/docs/ while the prompt rubric declares the flat tree canonical. Not regressed here; remains a follow-up, not a 106 blocker.
